title: Chrome Extension POC: Plan A (extension) + Plan B (autofill engine)
description: V1 POC build for Zovo deal demo. Plan A = Chrome extension (11 phases). Plan B = standalone autofill engine npm package (9 phases). Target demo April 20 2026.

llmconveyors.note: Backend + frontend changes stay in private repo; not shared with Michael pre-signing

parallelSafe.Day 5 (A8 B7 B8 B9): A8 starts AFTER B7/B8/B9 publish mid-day
parallelSafe.Day 6 (A9 A10 A11): A9 first, then A10 + A11 in parallel

verificationPolicy.perPhase: phase-local tests must pass + touched-repo typecheck + touched-repo build
verificationPolicy.perDay: cross-repo integration smoke test at end of each day
verificationPolicy.preDemo: full E2E flow on 3 live ATS postings (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday multi-step wizard) recorded to video

forbidden: skill-taxonomy imported anywhere in ats-autofill-engine (engine must never touch the moat corpus)
document or window in ats-autofill-engine src/core/**
chrome-extension-guide or chrome-extension-toolkit imports (Zovo toolkit not used)
TODO or FIXME in phase deliverables without linked issue

flaggedKnownIssues: Workday drag-drop file upload may silently fail via DataTransfer; B9 includes fallback toast
Keyword highlight button is disabled when signed out (Option O online-only)
SDK method client.ats.extractSkills NOT added in v0.4.0 — extension uses direct fetch for V1 POC
